creator: john.wolfe@broadcom.com
text:
Open-vm-tools 10.2.5 has been released.

Please see:

   https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/releases/tag/10.2.5

   https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/releases/download/10.2.5/open-vm-tools-10.2.5.tar.gz

For a cumulative list of changes, please see:

   https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/commits/stable-10.2.x
